# Doodle Baseball Game

> Play the addictive Doodle Baseball game online for free! Swing your bat, hit home runs in this fun food-themed baseball simulator. Test your timing & reflexes!

## Core Content
- [Play Game](https://doodlebaseball.info/#play): The main Doodle Baseball game experience.

## Important Resources
- [How to Play](https://doodlebaseball.info/#how-to-play): Instructions on playing the game.
- [Features](https://doodlebaseball.info/#features): Key features of the game website.
- [FAQ](https://doodlebaseball.info/#faq): Frequently asked questions.

## Latest Update
- [Main Game Stable](https://doodlebaseball.info/#play): The core game experience is stable and available.
